transcript.title: CBSE Class 11 Physics: Electrostatics
concepts: Electric charges, conservation of charge, Coulomb's law force between two point charges.
Electric field, electric field due to a point charge, electric dipole, electric field due to a dipole.
Gauss's law statement and its applications to find field due to infinitely long straight wire, uniformly charged infinite plane sheet.
Electric potential, potential difference, electric potential due to a point charge, potential energy of a system of charges.
Capacitors and capacitance, combination of capacitors in series and in parallel, capacitance of a parallel plate capacitor.

beats.speaker: Teacher
beats.text: Today we cover Electrostatics from your NCERT textbook. Open the official book on the left and follow along on the board.

beats.speaker: Priya
beats.text: Ma'am, could you explain Electric charges, conservation of charge, Coulomb's law force between two point charges with a board sketch?

beats.speaker: Teacher
beats.text: Good question, Priya. In Electric charges, conservation of charge, Coulomb's law force between two point charges, focus on definitions, units, and one NCERT worked example. This point is central to Electrostatics in Class 11 Physics.

beats.text: Ma'am, could you explain Electric field, electric field due to a point charge, electric dipole, electric field due to a dipole with a board sketch?

beats.speaker: Teacher
beats.text: Good question, Rahul. In Electric field, electric field due to a point charge, electric dipole, electric field due to a dipole, focus on definitions, units, and one NCERT worked example. This point is central to Electrostatics in Class 11 Physics.

beats.text: Good question, Amit. In Gauss's law statement and its applications to find field due to infinitely long straight wire, uniformly charged infinite plane sheet, focus on definitions, units, and one NCERT worked example. This point is central to Electrostatics in Class 11 Physics.

beats.text: Ma'am, could you explain Electric potential, potential difference, electric potential due to a point charge, potential energy of a system of charges with a board sketch?

beats.speaker: Teacher
beats.text: Good question, Sneha. In Electric potential, potential difference, electric potential due to a point charge, potential energy of a system of charges, focus on definitions, units, and one NCERT worked example. This point is central to Electrostatics in Class 11 Physics.

beats.speaker: Kavya
beats.text: Ma'am, could you explain Capacitors and capacitance, combination of capacitors in series and in parallel, capacitance of a parallel plate capacitor with a board sketch?

beats.speaker: Teacher
beats.text: Good question, Kavya. In Capacitors and capacitance, combination of capacitors in series and in parallel, capacitance of a parallel plate capacitor, focus on definitions, units, and one NCERT worked example. This point is central to Electrostatics in Class 11 Physics.

beats.speaker: Teacher
beats.text: That covers the core syllabus for Electrostatics. Revise NCERT intext questions and attempt two previous-year CBSE Class 11 items before your test.

Optical instruments: Microscopes and astronomical telescopes (reflecting and refracting).

transcript.title: CBSE Class 11-12 Chemistry: Coordination Compounds
concepts: Coordination compounds - Introduction, ligands, coordination number, color, magnetic properties.
Werner's theory of coordination compounds, IUPAC nomenclature of mononuclear coordination compounds.
Isomerism (structural and stereo) in coordination compounds.
Valence Bond Theory (VBT): hybridization, magnetic behavior (high spin and low spin).
Crystal Field Theory (CFT): d-orbital splitting in octahedral and tetrahedral fields, CFSE.
